{
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 46,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "aGOXBLkUm4GW"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "import math\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n"
      ],
      "id": "aGOXBLkUm4GW"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "kFzSeD7Hm4GY"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 2) Activation Functions\n",
        "تعريف `sigmoid` و `tanh`."
      ],
      "id": "kFzSeD7Hm4GY"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 47,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "xmT9wTf7m4GY"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "def sigmoid(x):\n",
        "    return 1 / (1 + math.exp(-x))\n",
        "\n",
        "def tanh(x):\n",
        "    return math.tanh(x)\n"
      ],
      "id": "xmT9wTf7m4GY"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "lSJMueQdm4GZ"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 3) LSTM Parameters\n",
        "الأوزان والقيم المستخدمة في المثال."
      ],
      "id": "lSJMueQdm4GZ"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 48,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Xv8Dvrfkm4Ga"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# LSTM weights\n",
        "Wf, Whf, bf = 0.5, 0.1, 0.0\n",
        "Wi, Whi, bi = 0.6, 0.2, 0.0\n",
        "Wc, Whc, bc = 0.7, 0.3, 0.0\n",
        "Wo, Who, bo = 0.8, 0.4, 0.0\n",
        "\n",
        "# Output layer\n",
        "Wy, by = 4.0, 0.0\n"
      ],
      "id": "Xv8Dvrfkm4Ga"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "QpXK_Jzom4Ga"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 4) Input Sequence and Initial States"
      ],
      "id": "QpXK_Jzom4Ga"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 49,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "vchKqZIOm4Gb",
        "outputId": "c6b034ed-627a-43de-99a4-04d917062950"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Input sequence: [1, 2, 3]\n",
            "Initial hidden state h0 = 0.0\n",
            "Initial cell state   c0 = 0.0\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "X = [1, 2, 3]\n",
        "\n",
        "h = 0.0  # initial hidden state\n",
        "c = 0.0  # initial cell state\n",
        "\n",
        "print('Input sequence:', X)\n",
        "print('Initial hidden state h0 =', h)\n",
        "print('Initial cell state   c0 =', c)\n"
      ],
      "id": "vchKqZIOm4Gb"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "OxUrSENBm4Gc"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 5) LSTM Step Function\n",
        "الدالة الأساسية التي تنفذ خطوة واحدة من الـ LSTM."
      ],
      "id": "OxUrSENBm4Gc"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 50,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "8udquuwmm4Gc"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "def lstm_step(x_t, h_prev, c_prev):\n",
        "    # Gates\n",
        "    f_t = sigmoid(Wf * x_t + Whf * h_prev + bf)\n",
        "    i_t = sigmoid(Wi * x_t + Whi * h_prev + bi)\n",
        "    c_hat_t = tanh(Wc * x_t + Whc * h_prev + bc)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Cell state update\n",
        "    c_t = f_t * c_prev + i_t * c_hat_t\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Output gate and hidden state\n",
        "    o_t = sigmoid(Wo * x_t + Who * h_prev + bo)\n",
        "    h_t = o_t * tanh(c_t)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        'x_t': x_t,\n",
        "        'f_t': f_t,\n",
        "        'i_t': i_t,\n",
        "        'c_hat_t': c_hat_t,\n",
        "        'c_t': c_t,\n",
        "        'o_t': o_t,\n",
        "        'h_t': h_t,\n",
        "    }\n"
      ],
      "id": "8udquuwmm4Gc"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "qQwS8musm4Gd"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 6) Forward Pass Through the Sequence\n",
        "هنا بنعدّي على السلسلة `[1, 2, 3]` ونخزن نتائج كل Time Step."
      ],
      "id": "qQwS8musm4Gd"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 51,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "AlfQ2e1Mm4Gd",
        "outputId": "5484a0a1-4280-4875-962f-ca11af9812f8"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "===== Time Step 1 =====\n",
            "Input x_t       = 1\n",
            "Forget gate f_t = 0.622\n",
            "Input gate i_t  = 0.646\n",
            "Candidate c~_t  = 0.604\n",
            "Cell state c_t  = 0.39\n",
            "Output gate o_t = 0.69\n",
            "Hidden state h_t= 0.256\n",
            "\n",
            "===== Time Step 2 =====\n",
            "Input x_t       = 2\n",
            "Forget gate f_t = 0.736\n",
            "Input gate i_t  = 0.778\n",
            "Candidate c~_t  = 0.901\n",
            "Cell state c_t  = 0.988\n",
            "Output gate o_t = 0.846\n",
            "Hidden state h_t= 0.64\n",
            "\n",
            "===== Time Step 3 =====\n",
            "Input x_t       = 3\n",
            "Forget gate f_t = 0.827\n",
            "Input gate i_t  = 0.873\n",
            "Candidate c~_t  = 0.98\n",
            "Cell state c_t  = 1.672\n",
            "Output gate o_t = 0.934\n",
            "Hidden state h_t= 0.871\n",
            "\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "history = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for t, x_t in enumerate(X, start=1):\n",
        "    result = lstm_step(x_t, h, c)\n",
        "    h = result['h_t']\n",
        "    c = result['c_t']\n",
        "    history.append({\n",
        "        't': t,\n",
        "        'x_t': result['x_t'],\n",
        "        'forget_gate': result['f_t'],\n",
        "        'input_gate': result['i_t'],\n",
        "        'candidate': result['c_hat_t'],\n",
        "        'cell_state': result['c_t'],\n",
        "        'output_gate': result['o_t'],\n",
        "        'hidden_state': result['h_t'],\n",
        "    })\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(f'===== Time Step {t} =====')\n",
        "    print('Input x_t       =', round(result['x_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print('Forget gate f_t =', round(result['f_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print('Input gate i_t  =', round(result['i_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print('Candidate c~_t  =', round(result['c_hat_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print('Cell state c_t  =', round(result['c_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print('Output gate o_t =', round(result['o_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print('Hidden state h_t=', round(result['h_t'], 3))\n",
        "    print()\n"
      ],
      "id": "AlfQ2e1Mm4Gd"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "1cbWz1bbm4Gd"
      },

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "y2jsMQhRm4Ge"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 8) Predict the Next Value\n",
        "في المثال ده هنجرّب الخطوة التالية باستخدام `x = 4` ثم نحسب الخرج النهائي."
      ],
      "id": "y2jsMQhRm4Ge"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 53,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 0
        },
        "id": "CZ_Uj34Pm4Ge",
        "outputId": "abb21589-bf8d-4981-d701-a18d6d42cd4d"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Next input x_next   = 4\n",
            "Next hidden state   = 0.957\n",
            "Predicted value y^  = 3.826\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "x_next = 4\n",
        "next_result = lstm_step(x_next, h, c)\n",
        "y_pred = Wy * next_result['h_t'] + by\n",
        "\n",
        "print('Next input x_next   =', x_next)\n",
        "print('Next hidden state   =', round(next_result['h_t'], 3))\n",
        "print('Predicted value y^  =', round(y_pred, 3))\n"
      ],
      "id": "CZ_Uj34Pm4Ge"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "ELDEFDHlm4Ge"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 9) Simple Visualization\n",
        "رسم يوضح تطور الـ Hidden State عبر الزمن."
      ],
      "id": "ELDEFDHlm4Ge"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 54,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 487
        },
        "id": "1QX1xUPlm4Gf",
        "outputId": "68960f73-dc09-4ead-a065-dda3238c4cca"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "time_steps = [row['t'] for row in history]\n",
        "hidden_states = [row['hidden_state'] for row in history]\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
        "plt.plot(time_steps, hidden_states, marker='o')\n",
        "plt.title('Hidden State Evolution Across Time Steps')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Time Step')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Hidden State')\n",
        "plt.grid(True)\n",
        "plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "id": "1QX1xUPlm4Gf"
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "NS9HfMUwm4Gf"
      },
      "source": [
        "## 10) Final Summary\n",
        "- تم تنفيذ الـ LSTM خطوة بخطوة.\n",
        "- تم حساب الجيتس والـ cell state والـ hidden state لكل عنصر في السلسلة.\n",
        "- تم توقع القيمة التالية باستخدام طبقة خرج بسيطة."
      ],
      "id": "NS9HfMUwm4Gf"
